ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-11-2026 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar being set for an Order of Examination as to Judgment Debtor Debra Landers.

Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk: Damon Carter; Dept. 505; Matter not reported

Judgment Creditor National Credit Acceptance, Inc. is present represented by William Abbott in court. 1
Judgment Debtor Debra Landers is not present.

There is a valid proof of service on file.

A Bench Letter was issued and mailed to Debra Landers named the person most knowledgeable on March 11, 2026.

If there are no appearance by the Judgment Debtor at the next calling, Judgment Creditor can request a Civl Bench Warrant.

This matter is continued to May 1, 2026 at 11:00am in dept. 505.
